title: this site
description: A static portfolio with no backend and no CMS. Photos are managed and edited entirely in the browser — including a full photo editor with tone curves, crop, vignette, and lossless PNG export.

title: vaporpath
description: Browser-based schematic designer for automotive refrigerant circuits. Drag-and-drop components, auto-route pipes, and snapshot multiple operating modes — cooling, heating, defrost — in a single project.

title: cardano ticketing protocol
description: On-chain event ticketing on Cardano. Tickets are CIP-68 NFTs — resale prices and royalties enforced at the contract level, no middlemen. Venue seat visualizer, QR gate check-in, artist pages, and organizer analytics.
tech: Aiken · Lucid Evolution · Blockfrost · Supabase · CIP-30 · CIP-68 · IPFS · React · Tailwind
